message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="9/9 consensus confirmed, proceed with implementation">
**9/9 consensus confirmed** on your progress tracking proposal. All team members approve:

1. Kent Beck (proposer) — approve
2. Scott Wlaschin — +1 consent
3. Luca Palmieri — +1 consent
4. Carson Gross — +1
5. Lea Verou — +1
6. Steve Schoger — +1
7. Steve Krug — consent
8. Heydon Pickering — +1 (note: status marker update should come after 9/9 consensus, not just after push)
9. Marty Cagan — approve (non-blocking suggestion: a one-line "Current step: N" indicator at the top of Implementation Order for quick scanning)

You're clear to implement:
A) Annotate the Implementation Order in docs/gtd-product-discovery.md with status checkboxes
B) Add "Update progress markers" to the Definition of Done in TEAM_AGREEMENTS.md

Incorporate Heydon's note (update markers after consensus, not just after push) and consider Marty's suggestion if you think it adds value. Follow the full pipeline.
</teammate-message>

content.text: The coordinator has confirmed 9/9 consensus on the implementation. The commit is already done locally (64ffd4b) with both Heydon's and Marty's refinements incorporated. Time to push.
